next_steps: Measure serum insulin and anti-insulin receptor antibodies (Type B syndrome evaluation)
Measure serum IGF-1 and perform glucose suppression test (Acromegaly evaluation)
Perform 24-hour urinary free cortisol or late-night salivary cortisol (Cushing's evaluation)
Test for insulin antibodies (free and total) and C-peptide to total insulin ratio
Review history for autoimmune or inflammatory triggers preceding fat loss
Consider referral for metabolic specialist consultation and potential initiation of metreleptin therapy
